commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3e7184b5f112678faaeffc4fc68532adaa886b15)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a NO_REPLY-only silent-turn shortcut in embedded runner code/tests and also changes Control UI update-handoff version handling.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +86. Total +108 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection and the linked reporter logs give a clear enough path to keep the bug fix under review: NO_REPLY is filtered from deliverable payloads while current main only treats empty assistant replies as silent when the caller flag allows it.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor revision and proof rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane because the external PR proof gate must be satisfied from a real setup and the branch needs scope cleanup.

target.title: fix(agents): treat NO_REPLY-only turns as silent regardless of silence flag (#92038)
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #92038.

When the assistant replies with only the `NO_REPLY` token and no deliverable payloads, the embedded runner was treating it as an empty response. This triggered:

1. Empty-response retry with visible-answer continuation
2. Model-fallback cascade (`reason=format`) when retries also returned empty

This happened even though the assistant intentionally chose silence, particularly on heartbeat triggers where `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent` defaults to `false`.

## Changes

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts`: Added an early check in `shouldTreatEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent` to recognize deliberate silent-reply tokens (e.g. `NO_REPLY`) before consulting the `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent` configuration flag.
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`: Added unit tests covering:
  - `NO_REPLY`-only turns are treated as silent even when `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent` is `false`
  - `NO_REPLY` is **not** treated as silent when actual payloads are present

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run`: 120 tests passed (including 2 new ones)

## Behavior addressed

- Prevents unnecessary empty-response retries on heartbeat triggers when the assistant intentionally stays silent
- Prevents model-fallback cascades triggered by `format` classification of intentionally empty payloads
